title: The Boy Who Hunts Akuma
overview: Evil is spreading across the globe, and young exorcist Allen Walker is humanity’s greatest hope to survive the gathering storm.

title: The Black Order
overview: After a difficult journey, Allen reaches Black Order headquarters, but the scar above his left eye doesn’t prompt anyone to roll out the red carpet.

title: The Ghost of Mater
overview: Allen sets out to recover Innocence discovered in southern Italy. When a powerful Akuma attacks him, the exorcist comes face to face with something eerily familiar.

title: Old Man of the Soil and a Lonely Night's Aria
overview: Allen continues his battle with an Akuma that has leveled up and gained the power to take on a person's appearance and powers.  Meanwhile, Kanda hears from the "Ghost" of Mater the history of the town and the Dolls they made to cheer themselves up.

title: Let Me Hear the Lullaby
overview: The adventure in Mater draws to a close as Allen and Kanda discover the truth of who the Doll actually is and then battle the level 2 Akuma for possession of the Innocence.

title: That Which Calls Forth Disaster
overview: On his way back to the Black Order headquarters from Mater, Allen meets a boy named Jean.  Jean and his friends have organized a patrol to search for Akuma within the town.  Allen warns the boy that this is dangerous, but Jean won't listen.

title: Tombstone of Memories
overview: Allen's past is revealed as he confronts the Earl of the millennium, who wants to kill Jean for causing problems with his patrol and calling the Earl "a bad guy".

title: The Black Order Annihilation Incident
overview: Allen still feels like a stranger at Black Order headquarters, and the young exorcist just can’t shake the feeling that he is being kept in the dark about certain happenings.

title: The Rewinding Town
overview: Allen and Lenalee investigate a town where time repeats, but a gang of Akuma is hell-bent on making sure they recover the missing Innocence before the exorcists do.

title: The Bad Luck Woman's Innocence
overview: Allen and Lenalee resolve to help Miranda in order to prevent time from repeating itself. Unbeknownst to them, Road has been watching their every move and has special plans for them.

title: Miranda Lotto's Feelings
overview: Road Kamelot has arrived to stop Allen and Lenalee from recovering the Innocence and halting the cruel cycle of repetition plaguing the town.

title: And Snow Falls Over the Town
overview: Road reveals something about the Millennium Earl’s grand scheme while battling the exorcists. Can Miranda harness her bizarre powers in time to save her new friends?

title: With the Coat
overview: The battle with Road is finally over and Allen is unsure on his reasons for becoming an exorcist, but after meeting a new exorcist partner, Lavi, his sense of reason returns to him by understanding the significance of wearing the exorcist uniform.

title: The Leaf of Revival
overview: Allen, Lavi, and Kanda investigate a region battered by violent weather changes. The exorcists believe Innocence may be to blame, but some locals put their faith in a mysterious legend.

title: Beyond the Snowstorm
overview: Allen, Lavi and Kanda continue their search for the Leaf of Revival, which they assume to be the Innocence. After realizing it is Innocence after all, the three Level 2 Akuma attack to retrieve it from them.

title: Millennium Swordsman
overview: While searching for an Innocence in Rome, Kanda encounters a mysterious swordsman named Victorio, whose power is unbelievably strong. When Kanda hasn't returned after a while, Komui asks Allen and Lenalee to go to Rome to investigate why Kanda is taking so long, thus they learn the history of Victorio and the Princess, whom he vowed to always fight for.

title: Pride of the Swordsman
overview: Allen, Lenalee and Kanda find themselves in a predicament when they battle Victorio. How can they stop someone who apparently cannot die from shear wounds?

title: Lenalee's Love
overview: Driven by suspicion, Lenalee’s brother unleashes Sir Komlin the Third. As the giant robot wreaks havoc, a threat with intentions born of the world’s greatest evil goes unnoticed.

title: Vampire of the Solitary Castle
overview: While on a mission to search for General Cross, Allen is beseeched by several villagers complaining about a "vampire problem." Soon after the ruckus, Lavi and Bookman join Allen on his new mission.

title: Go For It, Exorcists!
overview: Allen and Lavi decide to investigate Arystar Krory, the vampire who is supposedly terrorizing the village. They head up to Krory's castle and meet his beautiful lover, Eliade.

title: Krory Attacks
overview: When Allen and Lavi discover the truth about Krory's attack on the villagers, he appears before them with an intention to fight, thus leading to a rather fierce battle.

title: The Truth About Eliade
overview: While Lavi and Krory continue their battle outside the castle, Allen finds out the truth about Eliade.

title: The Vampire Whom I Loved
overview: Devastated by what he just learned about Eliade, Krory decides to fight her, despite his feelings toward her. Finally, Eliade is defeated and Krory decides to become an exorcist.

title: Krory's New Beginning
overview: From the ashes of a burning castle, a new breed of warrior emerges. Gone is the vampish killer - born anew is the naïve exorcist Krory.

title: The General's Chains
overview: Allen crosses paths with Yeeger - the oldest general in the Black Order. After a fierce battle, a generous meal, and a heart-rending story of loss, the exorcist’s spirit is renewed.

title: The Beginning of the End
overview: Allen longs for a father figure to illuminate his path in life, and the Millennium Earl rouses the Clan of Noah to search for the Heart of Innocence.

title: My Mentor, General Cross
overview: After General Yeegar's tragic death, Allen, Lenalee, Lavi and Krory are separated into two groups and sent to look for General Cross and guard him from the enemy. During this time, Allen tells Lenalee his bitter memories of Cross and the tragedy of a good friend.

title: Exorcist Krory
overview: Seeking the Heart of Innocence, the Clan of Noah savagely hunts down Black Order generals. Meanwhile, Krory prepares to embark upon his first solo mission.

title: The One Who Sells Souls (Part 1)
overview: The Millennium Earl is seen bouncing about cheerfully, answering several phone calls and confirming business deals. Allen and Lenalee arrive at Liverpool to meet Mother, who took care of Allen during his training years with General Cross, to ask her about his master's whereabouts. Both exorcists soon discover akuma in the area and a possible conspiracy at a local hospital.

title: The One Who Sells Souls (Part 2)
overview: While Allen comforts Lisa as she mourns her sweetheart's death, Lenalee investigates the cause of why there is a large quantity of akuma in the area, thus revealing the work of a Broker, who sells souls to the Millennium Earl. There are two suspects, the chief doctor, and a young money-hungry one. Working undercover as a nurse, Lenalee is determined to find out who.

title: Lost Miranda
overview: While heading off to Headquarters to become an exorcist, Miranda gets separated from her Finder escort. Here she meets a nice travelling family who takes her in, however, when Akuma discover her Innocence, they mount her but Officer Moores saves her just in enough time for Lenalee to come and rescue them both.

title: Mysterious Ghost Ship
overview: While waiting for a ship to rendezvous with Lenalee, Allen encounters a group of wannabe pirates who claim that a pirate ship is sinking ships along the coast.

title: The Village Where a Witch Lives (Part 1)
overview: While on his way to meet up with fellow exorcist, Daisya Barry, Kanda hears a rumor about "The Forest of No Return" and discovers he must pass through it. There, he meets a Finder named Gozu and soon comes upon a village where, according to a legend, a witch is supposed to live.

title: The Village Where a Witch Lives (Part 2)
overview: Kanda and Gozu discover the truth about the legend of the witch and Sophia's tragic past, which leads to a fierce battle.

title: Exorcist Clad in Wind
overview: As she is on her way to reunite with Allen, Lenalee agrees to accompany Gozu to the next town. However, in the midst of the forest, they meet a group of stranded villagers, running away from their home because of wolf attacks. The wolf attacks are revealed to be the work of Akuma and Lenalee receives help from Suman Dark, an exorcist and long time friend, who is searching for General Zokalo.

title: Shroud of Darkness
overview: Continuing their search for General Cross, Allen and Lenalee get attacked by Akuma and bump into a group of Finders. Meanwhile, at another breakfast gathering, The Millennium Earl announces to the Noah Clan that he's come up with a plan to get rid of the exorcists. He gives Tyki, Jasdero and David (Twins), and Skin a card with names on it of whom he'd like them to kill and get rid of.

title: Charity Bell
overview: As Kanda and Daisya head out to Barcelona to meet up with General Tiedoll, Daisya reminisces about his past on how he became an exorcist and how he met General Tiedoll.

title: Froi Tiedoll
overview: Swarms of Akuma track General Tiedoll to Barcelona, and Allen and Lenalee race towards the besieged city in a fleeting attempt to save their comrades.

title: Silent Coffins
overview: The Black Order suppresses the Akuma forces at Barcelona, but many are lost in battle. As Allen and Lenalee set off to find General Cross, Tiedoll searches for new recruits.

title: Requiem Rose
overview: Lavi and Krory are sent to protect Allen and Lenalee as they continue to look for General Cross. Their search is interrupted when Akuma attack a festival of roses.

title: A New Assassin
overview: Stranded on a rain-drenched night, Allen and his friends are lured into a trap by a black cat, but a growling stomach may prove to be their saving grace.

title: The Black Cat's Traps
overview: Lulu Bell dons a disarming disguise and leads Krory into a desert ambush, setting into motion her devious plan to divide and conquer Allen and his comrades.

title: The Wandering Stone Statue
overview: Krory and Allen’s attempted rendezvous with Lavi and Lenalee is derailed by their investigation of a walking statue. Is it Innocence at work or just another trap?

title: Iron Fan Maid
overview: Lenalee’s condition worsens, and Lavi knows he must get her to Bookman for immediate treatment; however, his daring rescue of a damsel in distress might cost him his Innocence.

title: Strange Mansion
overview: General Tiedoll enjoys painting the beautiful scenery he encounters, but Kanda is eager for action. Perhaps an Akuma outbreak at an unusual castle will satisfy both of their needs.

title: Illusions in the Snow
overview: Seeking a guide to lead them through a treacherous mountain pass, Allen and Krory stumble into a devious trap. Soon they will be visited by visions of the past.

title: The Crystal Girl
overview: Allen and his friends arrive at a village stricken by a mysterious water shortage. Their investigation leads them to a fortune teller who recognizes Lenalee from a disturbing vision.

title: Wavering Accommodator
overview: Bookman and Lenalee trace the dwindling water supply back to a terrified fortune teller whose crystal ball might be an Innocence fragment.

title: Lulu Bell's Bell
overview: Before Mei Ling can begin her training as an exorcist, she must use her gift to help her new friends survive another deadly encounter with the deranged Mimi.

title: Feelings of Devotion
overview: The exorcists embark on a perilous mission to transport Mei Ling to headquarters, but Lulu Bell of the Noah Clan has a surprise waiting for them.

title: Set Sail, to the East
overview: Allen and his friends resume their search for General Cross. After arriving at his last known location, they receive some terribly disheartening news.

title: Raid
overview: After the preparations are completed, the ship begins to set sail. In the distant horizon, Allen's left eye picks up legions of Akuma, both level 1 and 2, approaching the ship from the horizon. Realizing a massive attack, the exorcists prepare for battle. However, they soon discover that they are not the intended target...

title: Fallen One
overview: When Allen and Lenalee realize what became of Suman Dark, an Exorcist who went missing after his unit was attacked, they decide to rescue him.

title: The Beginning of the Night of the End
overview: Recognizing the enormous and uncontrollable white object as fellow exorcist and good friend, Suman Dark, a horrified Lenalee wonders how he became a Togaochi (Fallen). The legions of akuma continue to assault the huge Suman, but fail. Allen and Lenalee desperately try to discover how to stop Suman's Innocence from insanity.

title: A Scream
overview: Allen attempts to stop Suman from destroying a nearby village by increasing his Innocence's synchro rate to its maximum power. While struggling to stop the Togaochi, Allen's Innocence returns to normal and is severely damaged, causing him intense pain. Meanwhile, Lenalee learns the truth of a Togaochi and Suman's fate from Komui.

title: Delete
overview: The huge body of Suman begins to deteriorate and Allen wastes no time activating his Innocence, but unfortunately, his arm begins to grow in intense pain as he tries to remove Suman's Innocence. Miraculously, Allen manages to get Suman and his Innocence out of the body. Unfortunately, Suman is still alive but his mind has gone dead. Then......!

title: Loss and Reunion
overview: Samo Han Wong from the Black Order's Asian Branch brings word that Allen has been found and Lenalee and the others need to leave for Japan without him.

title: Asian Branch
overview: Allen regains consciousness, surprised to find himself still alive. Bak Chang, the Chief of the Black Order's Asian Branch, explains how he survived.

title: The Road of the Pledged
overview: When Allen remains unable to activate his Innocence, Bak comes up with a strategy to arouse his Innocence by creating a sense of crisis.

title: Title
overview: Determined to do anything it takes to restore his Innocence, Allen begins his training with Fou, doing battle with her while constantly trying to activate his Innocence to fight. Meanwhile, General Klaud Nine and General Winters Sokaro return to the Black Order upon news of the deaths of their exorcist units.

title: Sinking Darkness
overview: Lenalee continues her one-on-one fight against Eshi, a Level 3 Akuma, while other Akuma attack the ship from the sky.

title: Maiden Who Has Fallen into Darkness
overview: Remembering that Allen released his Innocence forcibly to save Suman, Lenalee decides to do the same to save her "world."

title: Ship Stalled, Girl Remains Absent
overview: Lenalee, floating in darkness, remembers Allen and what she said to him concerning her view of the world. Afterwards she pushes herself and her innocence to the limits and even exceeds them, defeating Eshii in the process and disappering once again.

title: Message
overview: While Lenalee is fighting the level 3 akuma, the sailors and exorcists on board the ship are trying to protect it from other akuma. After finally defeating them, they now wait Lenalee's return anxiously.

title: Landing
overview: Lenalee, Lavi, and the others have finally arrived in Japan. However, when three Level 3 Akuma appear, the group decides to hide rather than risk fighting them.

title: Confusion and Impatience
overview: Allen continues to train with Fo in order to revive his Innocence, without much improvement. Some members of the Asian Branch start questioning the necessity of keeping Allen within their base.

title: Heading to Edo
overview: Despite their best efforts, Lenalee and the others are unable to avoid the three Level 3 Akuma pursuing them. Just when they think they have no choice but to fight, an unexpected development occurs.

title: Silence
overview: Allen's innocence still hasn't resumed a physical form despite his continued training with Fo. However, some changes are observed. Could they be a clue to the revival of Allen's innocence?

title: Invasion
overview: A Level 3 Akuma whose dark matter holds the power of decomposition has invaded the Asian Branch base. As Allen still cannot activate his Innocence, Bak and the others try to protect him.

title: God's Clown
overview: Even though Allen's body is half decomposed and he still hasn't been able to revive his Innocence, he returns to the Level 3's location in order to save Fo.

title: The Name Chronicled
overview: Now that Allen's Innocence has been revived, he wants to rejoin his comrades as soon as possible and tells Bak that he'll take the teleporting device the Level 3 took to the Asian Branch.

title: Showdown in the Capital
overview: While Allen prepares to go to Edo, Lavi and the others are having difficulties fighting huge Akuma.

title: Kanda Joins the Battle
overview: The Froi Tiedoll unit arrives in Edo. The General tells his apprentices to go help Lavi and the others, who continue to struggle against the huge Akuma and Tyki Mick.

title: Edo Annihilated
overview: The black energy wave drawn out by the Millennium Earl swallows the city of Edo and causes further injuries to the members of the Cross unit.

title: Clown and Auguste
overview: Just when the Millennium Earl is about to snatch Lenalee, Allen arrives to rescue her. In the midst of a fierce battle, the Earl and Noahs suddenly disappear.

title: A Key and Noah's Doors
overview: Lenalee is sucked into a star-shaped hole that suddenly appeared. When Allen tries to grab her hand, he also falls into the hole... and so do some other Exorcists.

title: The Skinn Bolic Room
overview: In one of the rooms in the ark, Allen and the others encounter Skinn Bolic, a member of the Clan of Noah. Kanda declares that he will fight Skinn while the others move forward to find the next door.

title: Forbidden Skill, Sangen Style
overview: The fight between Kanda and Skinn begins. When Kanda realizes that his attacks are barely affecting Skinn, he decides to use the powerful Sangen Style technique. Meanwhile, the room starts collapsing.

title: Noah's Memory
overview: Never forgive Innocence... Never forgive Exorcists... Skinn's anger and animosity keep him alive and push him to further attack Kanda.

title: The Twins' Trap
overview: While the Noahs mourn Skinn's death, Allen, Lenalee, and the others move forward, believing that Kanda is okay and will catch up with them soon.

title: Debt Crisis
overview: After failing in their mission to capture Cross Marian, Jasdero and Devit decide to wait for him in the ark and to kill time by going after his apprentice Allen.

title: Bad Game
overview: The "Trick Glasses" created by Jasdero and Devit's ability make it difficult for Allen and Krory to fight them. Meanwhile, Lavi tries to find the lost key.

title: Jasdevi Enters the Scene
overview: Jasdero and Devit have merged and become Jasdevi. Jasdevi is so overwhelmingly powerful that Allen, Lavi, and Krory have a hard time fighting him.

title: Bloody Krory
overview: Trapped in an iron maiden, Krory is beginning to lose consciousness when he hears the voice of the woman he loved. Meanwhile, Allen and the others arrive in the last room.

title: Dark-Colored Rhapsody
overview: In the last room, the battle between Allen and Tyki Mikk begins, while Road tells Lavi to play with her if he wants to win the freedom of Lenalee and Chaozii.

title: Weak Humans
overview: The difference in power between Allen and Tyki is so great that Tyki easily knocks Allen down. Meanwhile, Lavi suffers and faces illusions in a dream created by Road.

title: Transcendent One
overview: Amidst great crisis, Allen's synchronization with his Innocence becomes stronger than ever, which results in his left arm turning into a large sword.

title: Lavi
overview: Lavi is trapped in the world of dreams created by Road. There, he's attacked by the people at the Black Order, including Lenalee and the other Exorcists.

title: Voice of Darkness
overview: While being burned by his own attack, Lavi asks his illusion for what purpose Bookmen exist and why wars never disappear from the human world.

title: Black Carnival
overview: The Noah within Tyki Mikk was supposed to have been destroyed by Allen; however, he has transformed into a dreadful figure and starts attacking Allen and the others.

title: Judgement
overview: After transforming, Tyki is completely in a different league from Allen and Lavi; however, they continue to fight against him. Then someone unexpected appears to rescue them.

title: Shadow of the Player
overview: The Millennium Earl says nothing can be done now that the "heart" of the ark has been transferred to the new ark, but Cross has other ideas.

title: Melody
overview: When Allen comes upon a piano in The Fourteenth's secret room, he suddenly starts hearing a song in his head and, much to his own surprise, finds himself playing it.

title: Homecoming
overview: After the ark returns to its original shape, Allen and the others go back to Edo, to the Asian Branch, and finally, to the Order's headquarters, where they are joyously welcomed back by the Order's staff.

title: Lamb and Dog
overview: While the Order's staff celebrates the return of the Exorcists, Director Rouvelier, a Special Inspector from the Central Agency, holds an advisory council meeting to question Cross Marian.

title: Still the Clock Ticks
overview: Howard Link comes to see Allen and declares his intention to keep an eye on him. Surprised by the news, Lenalee goes to see Komui in his office, where she's greeted by Director Rouvelier.

title: Attack on Headquarters
overview: Lab 5, where the egg is situated, is now under attack. Detecting the Akuma, Allen and some others rush to the lab, where they are stymied by a wall blocking the entrance.

title: The Power of Generals
overview: A violent battle ensues with Allen and Bookman fighting Lulubell's army of Level 3 Akuma, while the science department is slowly turned into a colony of Skulls.

title: The Noah of Lust
overview: Allen exorcises numerous Akuma but they won't stop coming at him, their aim being to prevent the exorcists from reaching the egg. In the meantime, Lulu Bell opens a new gate that will take the kidnapped Allen and the egg back to the Earl. Will she be able to make a clean escape?

title: Level 4
overview: A Level 4 Akuma has finally been born. Allen attacks it relentlessly, even though its overwhelming presence sends a shiver through his body.

title: To the God I Hate So Much
overview: Not knowing the status of the Exorcists in Lab 5, Komui decides to have all headquarters personnel evacuate. Meanwhile, Rouvelier takes Lenalee to Hevlaska.

title: The Promise
overview: Determined to protect her brother and the others at home, Lenalee drinks her Innocence in order to synchronize. Meanwhile, Allen pushes through his serious injuries in order to continue fighting the Level 4.

title: Echoes in the Long Morning
overview: After Allen and Lenalee defeat the Level 4 Akuma, Cross tells Komui to cancel the evacuation. However, the cancellation may be premature…
